output: Completed T5. task_updates.executor_notes: Updated docs/state_management_context_audit.md into the authoritative post-panes audit. The document now defines the field-count and external-consumer counting contract, inventories all 36 remaining createContext declarations (34 production, 2 test-only), classifies every remaining provider declaration and recomposed context-access hook family, and identifies the over-threshold non-pane follow-up surfaces for T6 with rationale.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. docs/state_management_context_audit.md now covers every remaining createContext declaration and every recomposed context-access hook family, records the counting contract, includes field counts and external production consumer counts, and assigns a decision plus rationale for each surface, including explicit exemptions and the T6 migration queue.
